metadata.title: Website Builder | Adon ERP
metadata.description: Build more than a website. Build a business. Design beautiful pages, sell products, manage customers, and grow from one integrated app.

hero.title: Scale your brand
hero.description: Build more than a website. Build a business. Design beautiful pages, sell products, manage customers, and grow from one integrated app.

dashboard.heroDescription: Fresh coffee, crafted with care for your morning energy.

builderSection.badge: What do you want to build?
builderSection.title: Dream it?
builderSection.description: Let the builder guide your website from idea to launch with smart blocks, apps, and editable designs.
builderSection.quote: There is only one way to create a beautiful website:

designerSection.title: Craft your site like a designer
designerSection.description: Drag and drop building blocks. Take full creative control with layouts, colors, images, fonts, spacing, and responsive design.

blockPreview.subtitle: A Section Subtitle
blockPreview.description: Create a beautiful page section with editable content, media, and buttons.

suggestions.headline: Generate a landing page headline for my furniture store.
suggestions.rewrite: Rewrite this product description in a friendly tone.
suggestions.seo: Create SEO meta title and description.

aiSection.title: Your AI sidekick
aiSection.description: Build great pages faster with smart AI assistance. Ask for headlines, product text, SEO content, translations, and layout ideas while you work.

integrationSection.title: Scalable and fully
integrationSection.subtitle: integrated
integrationSection.description: Plug your website into sales, inventory, marketing, CRM, appointments, accounting, and everything else your business needs.

freeSection.title: It's free.
freeSection.subtitle: For real.
freeSection.description: Your website builder is included with your apps. Build your website, connect your tools, and manage your business without jumping between platforms.

mobileResponsive.title: Mobile responsive
mobileResponsive.description: Your website automatically adapts to every screen size, from desktop to mobile.

translation.title: Translation
translation.description: Translate pages, products, and content to reach customers around the world.

themeCustomization.title: Theme customization
themeCustomization.description: Choose colors, fonts, layouts, and blocks to match your brand identity.

seo.title: SEO
seo.description: Optimize pages and product content to help customers find you online.

shapesAnimations.title: Shapes and animations
shapesAnimations.description: Give your website visual movement with modern sections, shapes, and effects.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.description: Learn where your visitors come from and understand what works best.

appsSection.title: One
appsSection.description: Expand as you grow with integrated apps that work together.

ctaSection.title: Join 15 million users
ctaSection.description: who grow their business with Adon

testimonial.quote: Adon's flexibility, scalability, and app ecosystem have been crucial for our success and community growth.
testimonial.name: Andrew Reed
testimonial.title: Digital business owner
